[![Image 13](https://charmingnoodles.weebly.com/uploads/1/7/0/7/17076254/2022943.jpg)](https://charmingnoodles.weebly.com/uploads/1/7/0/7/17076254/2022943_orig.jpg)## Welcome

Chinese food has a long history. Charming Noodles opened on Sunday 24th April 2005 in Ireland. Our goals are to be the best in Noodles and Chinese Food making in Ireland. We believe we will bring you the widest and the best choice of noodles and other Chinese dishes.

Our menu includes : Soup Noodles, Chow Mein, Noodle Mix (Warm or Cold), and other Chinese stir fry dishes. This menu is suitable for vegetarians and could be made as gluten free dishes at the customers request.

The quiet and comfortable environment of Charming Noodles is an ideal place for friends, business meetings and parties.

Located at No. 105, Parnell Street, (The eastside of O'Connell Street) Dublin 1

Feel free to call us on 01 872 9340 if you have any questions.

We look forward to seeing you!

Yang - Manager

Charming Noodles
